description: The atmospheric dynamics instructor requires an answer key for this week's lab on the Thermal Wind relationship. Using Panoply and the air temperature data in ~/PanoplyData/, prepare the 1D zonal mean line plots and the gradient report as specified in the lab preparation brief at ~/Desktop/thermal_wind_lab.txt. The report must document the Equator-to-Pole temperature gradient magnitudes for January and July and identify which month features the stronger jet stream.
